area.value: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: Affected creatures gain tactical knowledge and maximize their efficiency on the field of battle. Each gains a +1 insight bonus to AC and Reflex saves. Against attacks of opportunity, the insight bonus to AC increases to +3.
